title: Yui and the first part
wikitext:
[]: Yui and the first part             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 2:09 pm I've started to watch the anime once again, though this time only those which I could barely remember. I thought that it would be a good start to begin with the first part, just to get used to the atmosphere of the movie (again). When Shinji was whining in front of Unit-01, it's eyes are shown a lot of times. I'm not sure: is it just me, or the EVA's eyes get slowly thinner? As if Yui would start to get fed up with Gendo's manner, and/or perhaps the weakness of her son. (I must mention that the anime I have is quite... errr... low-quality, and the screen is sometimes quite like a dish of pap... especially when Asuka gives Sandalphon a little visit). But the real thing that made me write this thread: why did Gendo send in Unit-01 with such a useless pilot like Shinji? And when Unit-01 went berserk, he and Fuyutsuki didn't seem to be surprised at all. In truth, they seemed to me as if they were expecting this all the time. So: did Gendo rely on the theory that Yui will protect her son? Did he test her? Did he try to awaken the mother in the EVA? I'm veeery curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jul 19, 2006 2:32 pm Are you watching perfect collection or platinum? There's some extra "blinking" or whatever in platinum (I think that's what I have on my laptop, I've got to start picking better names for my files), the eyes go dim around: Ritsuko: â€œâ€¦ Reconfigure EVA-01's system to Rei. Restart!â€ Ibuki: â€œRoger. Suspend the current operation. Begin reactivation.â€ When Ritsuko and Misato are leaving the platform and Shinji kinda sticks around in front of Eva-01. Then they light back up again when Shinji is holding Rei on the platform after Eva-01 moved her arm to block the falling debris. Shinji glances at Eva-01 and then back at Rei, in the background Eva-01's eyes light back up. FauÃŸtin wrote: why did Gendo send in Unit-01 with such a useless pilot like Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jul 19, 2006 2:44 pm Don't ask what version I have... Probably because Shinji is the only one besides Rei who can (or has the possibility) of syncing with Eva-01. Gendo and Ritsuko seem to be well aware of this.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 19, 2006 5:34 pm Thumbnails of the "eye incidents" here . And, damn, I need to redo those thumbnails now that I have state-of-the-art cropping technology on my side. lulz So unsightly! BTW, Ornette, do you have a clean version of that Man-Rei dance GIF...?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jul 20, 2006 1:28 am Hmm... In this case I see that I was blind. The EVA's eyes didn't move an inch. And I have the original one, nothing else. Around my place you could never/barely buy the simple, original one. And if you indeed see it somewhere, the cost is just outrageous. 400-500$ as I recall. I told you its outrageous.
